title: Knights of the Old Republic 2
content:
{{Top|rwm|old|title=''Knights of the Old Republic'' 2}} {{Youmay|the second issue of the [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic (comic series)|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'' comic series]]|the game ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''}} {{ComicBook |image=[[File:Knights_of_the_Old_Republic_2.jpg]] |title=''Knights of the Old Republic'' 2 |writer=[[John Jackson Miller]][[Knights of the Old Republic 2|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 2]] |penciller=[[Brian Ching]] |inker= |letterer=[[Michael Heisler]] |colorist=[[Michael Atiyeh]] |cover artist=[[Travis Charest]] |editor=*[[Jeremy Barlow]] *[[Dave Marshall]] |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[February 22]], [[2006]]{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/12-858/Star-Wars-Knights-of-the-Old-Republic-2|text=Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic #2}} |pages=32 |upc= |timeline=[[3964 BBY]] |series=[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic (comic series)|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'']] |issue=2 }} '''''Knights of the Old Republic'' 2''' is the second issue in the [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic (comic series)|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'']] series of comics. ==Opening crawl== {{OpeningCrawl |name=COMMENCEMENT
"PART 2 (OF SIX)" |text=One of the five Padawans at the Jedi Academy on Taris, ZAYNE CARRICK fears he won't be elevated to knight- hood with his classmates. And with good reason: his mission to capture GRYPH, a small-time Snivvian con artist, goes awry. Zayne finally captures Gryph, but the chase makes him late for the graduation ceremony at the Jedi Temple. He rushes there, hopeful the completed assignment will help his cause. But nothing can help him understand what he sees when he arrives: ''his four Padawan friends lie dead at the feet of their own Masters''. "You're late," says Lucien, Zayne's Master. Zayne runs…but where can he go?}} ==Plot summary== After walking in on his friends, and fellow students [[Padawan Massacre|lying dead next to their masters]], [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Zayne Carrick]] flees [[Taris/Legends|Taris]]' [[Jedi Tower|Jedi Temple]] with his masters in hot pursuit. Jumping on his [[Urban Navigator|speeder]] where criminal [[Marn Hierogryph]] is still locked up, Zayne and Gryph manage to escape the Jedi by crashing through a University and falling down a garbage chute that brings them to the [[Lower City]]. While taking a moment to relax, Zayne explains Gryph the reason as to why the Jedi were pursuing. Not convinced that Zayne didn't murder the Padawans himself, Gryph gets hold of Zayne's [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] to protect himself. Zayne, however, is able to reason with Gryph and tells him that his clumsiness and lack of ability would prevent him from ever being capable of killing even one Jedi. Persuaded, Gryph hands back Zayne's saber, but not before destroying a [[Surveillance droid/Legends|surveillance droid]] that he spots. Aware that both the Jedi and [[Taris Civil Authority|Civil Authority]] are after them, and knowing that there are bounties on their heads, the duo go into hiding in the Taris underworld. Hiding in a cantina, Zayne comes to the realization that in order to find the reason behind the Jedi Masters' behavior, he must leave Taris immediately to revisit the places he where he trained to gather information. Meanwhile, back at the Temple, the meditating Jedi foresee Zayne and Gryph's plan: to go into the [[Undercity (Taris)|Undercity]]. ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Knights of the Old Republic 2}} ===Cover gallery=== File:Knights_of_the_Old_Republic_2.jpg|Cover art File:SWKOTOR2-FC.jpg|Full cover art ===Collected in=== *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Volume 1:
